_comment: Hyper-SD 8-step CFG-preserved LoRA for SDXL. Monorepo requires weight_name to pick the correct .safetensors. lora_scale=0.125 per model card recommendation. Ideal scheduler is DDIMScheduler with timestep_spacing='trailing' but the default SDXL scheduler also works. guidance_scale 5–8 is the valid range for this CFG-preserved variant.
description: Hyper-SD 8-step acceleration LoRA for SDXL (CFG-preserved variant). Drastically reduces inference steps while keeping guidance scale support.
